parents.subject: LU-13729 osd-ldiskfs: race access to iam_formats during setup

commit.subject: LU-13749 tests: add command to pcc sanity test
commit.message:
LU-13749 tests: add command to pcc sanity test

This patch is to fix error sh: quotacheck: command not found
during sanity-pcc test run.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-pcc
Signed-off-by: Vikentsi Lapa <vlapa@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I4bb6a59874f38cccb3df07edcc09973403a4966d
